name: punch-camera-device-20
description: Sample 20 real punch camera actions across desktop, tablet, and phone landscape viewports while preserving zoom, orientation, visibility, and geometry clearance.

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local S=game:GetService('StudioDeviceSimulatorService') local n='VQC Camera Desktop 1366x768' local id for _,x in ipairs(S:GetDeviceListAsync()) do if S:GetDeviceInfoAsync(x).Name==n then id=x break end end local c={Name=n,Width=1366,Height=768,PixelDensity=96,DeviceForm=Enum.DeviceForm.Desktop} if id then S:UpdateDeviceAsync(id,c) else id=S:CreateDeviceAsync(c) end S:SetDeviceAsync(id) S:SetScalingModeAsync(Enum.DeviceSimulatorScalingMode.FitToWindow) task.wait(.3) local r=S:GetResolutionAsync() return H:JSONEncode({active=S:GetDeviceAsync()==id,width=r.X,height=r.Y})

local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke('Reset') c:Invoke('SetStats',{Power=6000,WallLevel=99,Depth=0,CritChance=0,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0}) local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local r=p.Character.HumanoidRootPart r.AssemblyLinearVelocity=Vector3.zero r.CFrame=CFrame.lookAt(Vector3.new(-2,3,-27),Vector3.new(-2,3,-240)) p:SetAttribute('LastWallHit',0) return true

local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local S=game:GetService('StudioDeviceSimulatorService') local n='VQC Camera Tablet 1024x768' local id for _,x in ipairs(S:GetDeviceListAsync()) do if S:GetDeviceInfoAsync(x).Name==n then id=x break end end local c={Name=n,Width=1024,Height=768,PixelDensity=160,DeviceForm=Enum.DeviceForm.Tablet} if id then S:UpdateDeviceAsync(id,c) else id=S:CreateDeviceAsync(c) end S:SetDeviceAsync(id) S:SetOrientationAsync(Enum.ScreenOrientation.LandscapeLeft) S:SetScalingModeAsync(Enum.DeviceSimulatorScalingMode.FitToWindow) task.wait(.3) local r=S:GetResolutionAsync() return H:JSONEncode({active=S:GetDeviceAsync()==id,width=r.X,height=r.Y})

local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke('Reset') c:Invoke('SetStats',{Power=6000,WallLevel=99,Depth=0,CritChance=0,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0}) local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local r=p.Character.HumanoidRootPart r.AssemblyLinearVelocity=Vector3.zero r.CFrame=CFrame.lookAt(Vector3.new(-2,3,-27),Vector3.new(-2,3,-240)) p:SetAttribute('LastWallHit',0) return true

local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local S=game:GetService('StudioDeviceSimulatorService') local n='VQC Camera Phone 844x390' local id for _,x in ipairs(S:GetDeviceListAsync()) do if S:GetDeviceInfoAsync(x).Name==n then id=x break end end local c={Name=n,Width=844,Height=390,PixelDensity=460,DeviceForm=Enum.DeviceForm.Phone} if id then S:UpdateDeviceAsync(id,c) else id=S:CreateDeviceAsync(c) end S:SetDeviceAsync(id) S:SetOrientationAsync(Enum.ScreenOrientation.LandscapeLeft) S:SetScalingModeAsync(Enum.DeviceSimulatorScalingMode.FitToWindow) task.wait(.3) local r=S:GetResolutionAsync() return H:JSONEncode({active=S:GetDeviceAsync()==id,width=r.X,height=r.Y})

local c=game.ServerStorage.PunchWallAutomation c:Invoke('Reset') c:Invoke('SetStats',{Power=6000,WallLevel=99,Depth=0,CritChance=0,FistMultiplier=1,PetMultiplier=0}) local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1] local r=p.Character.HumanoidRootPart r.AssemblyLinearVelocity=Vector3.zero r.CFrame=CFrame.lookAt(Vector3.new(-2,3,-27),Vector3.new(-2,3,-240)) p:SetAttribute('LastWallHit',0) return true

local S=game:GetService('StudioDeviceSimulatorService') S:StopSimulationAsync() task.wait(.2) local names={['VQC Camera Desktop 1366x768']=true,['VQC Camera Tablet 1024x768']=true,['VQC Camera Phone 844x390']=true} local removed=0 for _,id in ipairs(S:GetDeviceListAsync()) do local info=S:GetDeviceInfoAsync(id) if names[info.Name] and info.IsCustom then S:RemoveDeviceAsync(id) removed+=1 end end return {default=S:GetDeviceAsync()=='default',removed=removed}
local S=game:GetService('StudioDeviceSimulatorService') pcall(function() S:StopSimulationAsync() end) return true
